title: pithecellobium inundatum
intro: Pithecellobium inundatum, also known as the floating guanacaste, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Pithecellobium inundatum include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal infusion or decoction, and its extracts are used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments.
